problem.title: Check If There Is A Valid Path in A Grid

approaches.title: Disjoint Set Union (DSU) Grid Traversal
approaches.summary: Uses DSU to connect adjacent cells based on street directions, checking if start and end are connected.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial DSU implementation with helper functions for street directions.

approaches.title: Breadth-First Search (BFS) Grid Traversal
approaches.summary: Explores valid paths using BFS, tracking direction and ensuring street connections between cells.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Replaced DSU with BFS, using direction checks and queue for path exploration.
